medialive.channel.rtmpoutputsettings.Cer.Docs: If set to verifyAuthenticity, verifies the TLS certificate chain to a trusted certificate authority (CA). This causes RTMPS outputs with self-signed certificates to fail.

medialive.channel.rtmpoutputsettings.Con.Docs: The number of seconds to wait before retrying a connection to the Flash Media server if the connection is lost.

medialive.channel.rtmpoutputsettings.Des.Docs: The RTMP endpoint excluding the stream name (for example, rtmp://host/appname).
